briefing: NASDAQ +1.5% and S&P 500 +0.8% deliver a solid risk-on session to close out Q2 2026. BRUN is the only ticker in the screened list hitting all four required confirmation signals simultaneously, making it the clear high-conviction entry. Deploying available cash into BRUN and holding the remaining three open slots for future risk-on setups with equally strong confirmation.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Window dressing happens at the end of each quarter when fund managers buy stocks that have performed well recently — even if they didn't hold them all quarter — so their reported portfolio looks full of winners. This creates artificial buying pressure that can push already-strong stocks even higher right before quarter-end. Savvy investors watch for this pattern because it can amplify momentum signals like the ones seen in today's top candidates.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「窗口裝飾」是指每季末基金經理買入近期表現亮眼的股票——即使整個季度並未持有——目的是讓披露的持倉看起來盈利豐厚。這種行為會在季末前製造人為的買盤壓力，令原本已強勢的股票進一步上漲。精明的投資者會留意這一規律，因為它往往會放大技術動能指標的信號，正如今日頂尖候選股所呈現的態勢。

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied into quarter-end as institutional fund managers engaged in classic 'window dressing' — buying recent winners to improve the appearance of Q2 holdings before reporting deadlines. Tech and growth stocks led gains, pushing NASDAQ up 1.5%, as portfolio managers chased performance ahead of the June 30 close. Broader risk appetite held firm with the S&P 500 adding 0.8%, reflecting continued optimism around AI infrastructure demand and resilient consumer spending.
market_education.summary_zh: 市場於季末上揚，機構投資者積極進行「窗口裝飾」操作——在第二季報告截止前買入近期強勢股，以美化季末持倉。科技及成長股領漲，帶動納斯達克指數上升1.5%。標普500指數同步上漲0.8%，反映市場對人工智能基礎建設需求及消費者支出韌性的持續樂觀情緒。

trades.reasoning: Top-ranked candidate (score 100) with all four confirmation signals: MACD crossover, RSI in bullish zone (66.9), price above SMA-20, and a volume surge — exactly the multi-signal setup the strategy requires, and cash is above threshold with slots open on a risk-on day.
